title: AssetType
content:
# AssetType


## Properties

- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Asset Type was created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` for the Asset Type. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
- **title** (`string`): Display name (`title`) of the Asset Type.
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any Asset Type keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
summary: Object with properties: created, name, title, updated

created.description: UTC time when the Asset Type was created, formatted in RFC 3339.

name.description: Unique identifier `name` for the Asset Type. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

title.description: Display name (`title`) of the Asset Type.

updated.description: UTC time when any Asset Type keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
